ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-18-2022 Continued To Aug-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Poole, via Zoom, for Henry Helmer, Jr., and Steve Condiotti, Co-Executors.

Mr. Poole reports regarding the delays in obtaining information to complete the Inventory and Appraisal (I&A) but that he expects to have the information he requires to finalize the I&A this week and will file it and then intends to file a petition for final distribution thereafter.

The matter is continued to Aug-22-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-06-2022 Continued To Jul-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Poole, via ZOOM, counsel for Steve Condiotti, Petitioner, and Henry Helmer, Jr., in court, Petitioner.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated October 18, 2019 is admitted to probate. Henry Z. Helmer, Jr. and Steve Condiotti are appointed Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 06, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
